import pandas as pd
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from typing import Tuple

def task_func(df, col1, col2) -> Tuple[sns.axisgrid.Axes]:
    if not isinstance(df, pd.DataFrame):
        raise TypeError("Input must be a DataFrame.")

    if df.empty:
        raise ValueError("The DataFrame is empty.")

    if not set(col1) & set(df.columns) or not set(col2) & set(df.columns):
        raise ValueError(f"DataFrame does not contain columns {col1} or {col2}.")

    numeric_cols = df.select_dtypes(include=['int64', 'float64']).columns

    if not (col1 in numeric_cols and col2 in numeric_cols):
        raise TypeError("DataFrame uses non-numeric data for the specified columns.")

    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 6))
    sns_plot = sns.scatterplot(x=col1, y=col2, data=df, ax=ax)
    slope, intercept, r_value, p_value, stderr = stats.linregress(df[col1], df[col2])
    line = ax.plot([df[col1].min(), df[col1].max()], [slope * df[col1].min() + intercept, slope * df[col1].max() + intercept], color='red')[0]
    ax.set_xlabel(col1)
    ax.set_ylabel(col2)
    ax.set_title('Scatter plot with regression line')

    return ax, sns_plot
